required_skills: Strategic analysis and hypothesis-driven problem solving
Quantitative modeling including financial modeling and scenario analysis
Market sizing, competitive benchmarking, and industry research
Business operations and process improvement methodologies
Data analysis and deriving actionable insights from large datasets
Structured communication — strategy memos, executive presentations, and business cases
Project management and managing multiple concurrent workstreams
SQL and data querying for self-serve analysis
preferred_skills: Prior experience in strategy consulting, investment banking, or corporate strategy roles
Experience with revenue operations or go-to-market strategy execution
Familiarity with SaaS growth metrics — CAC, LTV, NRR, churn, payback period
Exposure to M&A, partnerships, or business development workflows
Experience using BI tools to build automated dashboards and reporting pipelines
Knowledge of lean or agile methodologies applied to operational improvement
Understanding of venture-backed company dynamics and startup operating rhythms
responsibilities: Conduct rigorous market sizing, competitive landscape analysis, and business case development to support strategic decision-making by senior leadership
Build and maintain financial models, scenario analyses, and unit economics frameworks to evaluate new business initiatives and investment decisions
Design and optimize core operational workflows, identifying process inefficiencies and implementing improvements that reduce cost or increase throughput
Partner with functional leads across sales, product, and finance to define, track, and report on strategic and operational KPIs
Develop executive-ready strategy memos, board presentations, and business reviews that synthesize data into clear recommendations
Lead cross-functional workstreams on strategic initiatives such as new market entry, pricing redesign, or operational scale-up
Perform competitive intelligence gathering and synthesize findings into actionable strategic implications for leadership
Manage the company's OKR and quarterly planning process, ensuring alignment between team-level execution and company-level strategy
Identify and evaluate strategic partnership and M&A opportunities by conducting quantitative screening and qualitative due diligence
Build self-serve analytics dashboards using BI tools to give business leaders real-time visibility into operational and financial performance
